params.name: Kekule Structure
params.description:
On Feb 8, 1866 AD, the structure of the benzene ring came to Kekule in a dream, and he drew the famed Kekule structure.
The Kekulean Structure, which is the formula of benzene, was created by Kekule, a Gaman organic chemist. In this structure, the carbon atoms are connected alternately with single and double bonds to form a ring model, which keeps the carbon atoms four-valent. The discovery of this structure played a huge role in promoting the development of organic chemistry. It is said that …
